original_prompt: use the attached module to implement the capability of adding custom forms/ fields to all the entities...
rephrased_goal: Implement custom forms view that maps fields to collections (users, appointments, vans, items). Inject these fields into respective Add/Edit modals and save data.

subtasks_required: Adapt template to write to Firestore under 'forms'
Replace 'projects' mapping with internal system modules (vans, users, appointments, items)
Add path to index.html and main.js router
tasks.analogy_reference: Build cave wall to draw hunt plan on
tasks.testing_criteria: Menu link exists, page loads, form creation saves to firestore forms collection.

tasks.analogy_reference: Poke the wall to make sure it doesn't fall
tasks.testing_criteria: UI code is syntactically sound and exports properly.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Inject fields to Appointments and Users
subtasks_required: Modify view.appointments.js and view.users.js models to fetch relevant custom fields
On form submit, catch the custom keys and append to config object (custom_data)
tasks.testing_criteria: Forms append new inputs dynamically. Data saves correctly to firestore doc.

subtasks_required: Ensure no undefined errors when forms snapshot returns empty
tasks.analogy_reference: Throw spear, see if sharp rock falls off
tasks.testing_criteria: Code review confirms safe iteration and destructuring of form inputs.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Inject fields to Vans and Items
subtasks_required: Apply identical custom field injection pattern to Vans
tasks.analogy_reference: Attach sharp rocks to secondary spears
tasks.testing_criteria: Vans and Items correctly render forms tied to their entity name.

subtasks_required: Code review view.vans.js and view.items.js changes
tasks.testing_criteria: Safe mappings. Safe object assignments on submit.

subtasks_required: Verify no bugs introduced in the app shell routing
Make sure form data triggers work with custom props naturally if they map at doc root/custom root
tasks.testing_criteria: Does whole project work together? No missing rocks?
